title: Department Manager Vacancy at Taj Hotels Retail - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Taj Hotels Retail - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Taj Hotels Retail is actively seeking a talented and motivated Department Manager to join our dynamic team in Ahmedabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Taj Hotels Retail:
Taj Hotels Retail is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Taj Hotels Retail!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
